subject: 030302: NOT A GRB
body:
Diego Gotz on behalf of IBAS localization team reports:

Offline analysis of the INTEGRAL data regarding the possible GRB detected
on 2003-03-02 at 12:38:52.3300 UTC (IBAS Alert Packet n.130) reveals
that this trigger was a false event not related to a GRB.

thanks,

Diego
